name: minecraft
description: Claude Code marketplace for Minecraft server and modpack management

plugins.name: minecraft-prism-client
plugins.description: Audit and update Prism Launcher Fabric modpacks — find better mods, check versions, apply changes, publish to friends

plugins.name: minecraft-papermc-server
plugins.description: Audit and update PaperMC server plugins — check Paper versions, find better plugins, update versions, stage-test and apply changes safely, run villager census

plugins.name: minecraft-spark-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze Spark profiler reports from Minecraft players to diagnose client-side FPS issues and server-side TPS problems
